<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Billing\Abstractions;

use Koine\Billing\ValueObjects\Customer;
use Koine\Billing\ValueObjects\Invoice;
use Koine\Legacy\ValueObjects\Account;
use Koine\Legacy\ValueObjects\Charge;

/** Anti-corruption translator from upstream context Legacy into Billing. */
interface LegacyToBillingTranslator
{
    public function translateAccountToCustomer(Account $source): Customer;

    public function translateChargeToInvoice(Charge $source): Invoice;
}
